description:
# Seared Scallops with Pea Purée

This elegantly plated fine dining dish features seared scallops with a golden crust, served over vibrant green pea purée and a creamy sauce. The composition is refined and sophisticated, garnished with fresh rosemary sprigs, chive batons, and delicate purple flowers on a pale blue plate, evoking an upscale restaurant atmosphere.

# Seared Salmon Description

This image showcases perfectly seared salmon fillets with a caramelized, golden-brown crust, garnished with fresh rosemary, thyme, and microgreens on a dark slate plate. The professional plating and warm lighting create an elegant, restaurant-quality mood that conveys fine dining sophistication.
